name: 18Lab Golf
about: 18Lab Golf is a high-tech golf performance center in Westlake, OH, that combines advanced technology with PGA-level instruction for year-round game improvement. The facility features multiple simulator bays equipped with Trackman radar, augmented reality putting with PuttView, and AI-powered 3D swing analysis through Sportsbox AI. Membership options are available with various tiers offering different booking privileges and usage hours, while also providing access to lessons, club fitting, leagues, and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-grade Trackman radar for precise swing and ball flight data
AI-powered 3D swing analysis with Sportsbox for unparalleled insights
Augmented reality putting area with PuttView technology
Year-round climate-controlled facility with multiple simulator bays
Comprehensive membership options with priority booking

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food services

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-grade radar technology for swing and ball flight analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the facility also offers club rentals and professional club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about bringing outside food and drink, though the venue has a comfortable lounge area.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes can vary depending on the number of players and simulator bay availability, but typical sessions last between 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information is provided about child-friendly features or junior programs.
